source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for clear product planning UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for headings, body, labels, and numerals.
layout: Open 8px grids, lake-horizon dividers, granite card boundaries, calm planning dashboards, and spacious workflow surfaces.

prompts.label: Transparent alpine lake motif source
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a clear alpine lake motif with teal water, granite grey shoreline stones, snow white ridgeline reflections, and crisp mountain-lake silhouette, isolated full subject, no text.
Subject: A compact landscape cutout of a calm alpine lake edge with transparent water color, granite forms, snow highlights, and subtle pine-shadow details.
Composition/framing: centered complete motif with generous padding; do not crop the lake, stones, or ridgeline reflection.
Lighting/mood: clean daylight, calm planning-system mood, natural teal water and granite contrast.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be uniform with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no people, no cabins, no boats, no text, no watermark, no decorative background.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Alpine Lake" derived from the visible transparent alpine lake motif.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from teal water, granite grey, snow white, glacier blue, and lake-horizon geometry. This light board is the primary reference for coding any future theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board.
Required visible sections: Morphous Alpine Lake, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples with Geist and Noto Sans JP guidance.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, metric cards, charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise grid, 8px card radius, clear planning UI, waterline dividers, granite borders, snow-white surfaces.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Alpine Lake".

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the visible Morphous Alpine Lake design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent alpine lake motif and the visible light-mode board as references. Preserve the teal water palette roles, granite structure, snow highlights, lake-horizon dividers, spacing, Japanese typography, and shadcn/tweakcn component coverage. This dark board is the companion reference for coding any future theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board.
Required visible sections: Morphous Alpine Lake, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Visual details: deep lake ink background, pale snow text, alpine teal primary accents, granite grey cards, glacier blue focus states, restrained contrast, crisp cards and controls.
Constraints: no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no flat pure-black-only background, no illegible text, no random brand names.
